stemHtml: What do you understand by "Adiabatic Cooling"?

options.a: When the pressure applied on a parcel of air is reduced, the air in the parcel is allowed to expand; as the volume increases, the temperature falls as its internal energy decreases.
options.b: When the pressure applied on a parcel of air is increased, the air in the parcel is allowed to expand; as the volume increases, the temperature falls as its internal energy decreases.
options.c: When the pressure applied on a parcel of air is reduced, the air in the parcel is allowed to expand; as the volume increases, the temperature increases as its internal energy decreases.
options.d: When the pressure applied on a parcel of air is increased, the air in the parcel is allowed to expand; as the volume increases, the temperature increases as its internal energy decreases.
